features.name: enum function return with non-enum expression
features.description: Code should include a function with enum return type that returns a non-enum integer literal

features.name: enum function argument with non-enum expression
features.description: Code should include a function call where an integer literal is passed to an enum-typed parameter

features.name: enum array element assignment to enum variable
features.description: Code should include an enum-typed variable assigned from an enum-typed unpacked array element
